title: Govern upgrade with Work Item lifecycle
outOfScope: Automatic commit, push, PR, merge, or branch deletion by the installer.

sources.reason: Upgrade lifecycle requirements and existing governance contract.
Existing upgrade transaction, backups, and Git helpers.

riskAssessment.reason: Upgrade changes managed governance files and must produce reviewable lifecycle evidence and rollback data.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the full implementation loop.

preReviewWarnings: Review source/target versions, dedicated branch, managed-file diff, and rollback backup.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Upgrade creates an active Contract and Summary on a dedicated upgrade branch when a remote default branch is discoverable, while blocking active Work Items by default.
Contract/Summary record source and target versions, managed file changes, and rollback backup paths.
Upgrade performs no commit, push, PR, merge, or branch deletion and tests cover the lifecycle boundary.
guidelines: Upgrade must fail closed when active Work Items exist unless --upgrade-with-active is explicit.
Rollback backups must remain available until the upgrade is reviewed.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Active Work Item blocks upgrade by default
Upgrade records versions, managed diff, and rollback backup
Installer does not commit, push, merge, or delete review branches

intent.problem: Upgrade currently performs transactional file replacement but does not create the same active Work Item, branch, version-diff, and review evidence lifecycle as first adoption.
constraints: Preserve rollback behavior and local-only upgrade compatibility.
Installer must not perform external review or merge actions.
intent.rationale: Making upgrade a governed Work Item prevents unreviewed governance replacement and leaves a durable recovery path.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized code, documentation, tests, CI, and lifecycle changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
